headline: Assessing Digital Realty Trust’s Valuation After Strong Recent Shareholder Returns
summary: What Digital Realty Trust’s Recent Returns Signal for Investors Digital Realty Trust (DLR) has drawn attention after delivering a 24.1% total return over the past year, alongside a 12.7% gain in the past 3 months and a 10.6% 3 year total return. See our latest analysis for Digital Realty Trust. The recent 1 day and 7 day share price declines sit against a stronger 90 day share price return of 12.7%, while the 3 year total shareholder return of 106.3% points to robust longer term...

headline: Digital Realty Milan Move And Samsung Deal Put Valuation In Focus
summary: Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR) is expanding into Milan by acquiring land for a large-scale data center campus serving Southern Europe. The Milan development adds to the company’s presence in Rome, making it the only global data center provider in both of Italy’s main connectivity hubs. Digital Realty is also supporting Samsung Electronics with scalable data center solutions at its new ICN10 facility in Seoul. These moves highlight a growing focus on AI, cloud, and interconnection...
